item.title: The Big Bang: Science and Human Perspective
item.description: An exploration of the Big Bang theory and how people interpret its meaning, combining scientific understanding with philosophical reflection.

media:content.media:title: The Big Bang: Science and Human Perspective
media:content.media:description: An exploration of the Big Bang theory and how people interpret its meaning, combining scientific understanding with philosophical reflection.

item.title: Gravity and the Limits of Understanding
item.description: A look at how scientists have studied gravity from Newton to modern physics, and why it remains one of the most complex forces to fully explain.

media:content.media:title: Gravity and the Limits of Understanding
media:content.media:description: A look at how scientists have studied gravity from Newton to modern physics, and why it remains one of the most complex forces to fully explain.

item.title: What You Might Not Know About Campfires
item.description: A look at how campfires burn, why flames change color, and the science behind heat, smoke, and combustion outdoors.

media:content.media:title: What You Might Not Know About Campfires
media:content.media:description: A look at how campfires burn, why flames change color, and the science behind heat, smoke, and combustion outdoors.

item.title: Why the Sun Isn’t Always Overhead
item.description: A simple explanation of how Earth’s tilt and orbit affect the Sun’s position in the sky throughout the day and across seasons.

media:content.media:title: Why the Sun Isn’t Always Overhead
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of how Earth’s tilt and orbit affect the Sun’s position in the sky throughout the day and across seasons.

item.title: The Big Bang and Black Holes Explained
item.description: An overview of the Big Bang and black holes, exploring how these concepts help scientists understand the origin and structure of the universe.

media:content.media:title: The Big Bang and Black Holes Explained
media:content.media:description: An overview of the Big Bang and black holes, exploring how these concepts help scientists understand the origin and structure of the universe.

item.title: The Science Behind Staying Unseen
item.description: An overview of how visibility works, including light, perception, and simple ways objects can be harder to detect in different environments.

media:content.media:title: The Science Behind Staying Unseen
media:content.media:description: An overview of how visibility works, including light, perception, and simple ways objects can be harder to detect in different environments.

item.title: How An Astrophysicist Cuts An Onion
item.description: A light, science-inspired take on cutting an onion, with simple tips that help reduce irritation while preparing food.

media:content.media:title: How An Astrophysicist Cuts An Onion
media:content.media:description: A light, science-inspired take on cutting an onion, with simple tips that help reduce irritation while preparing food.

item.title: It’s Getting Harder To Know What’s Real
item.description: A look at how digital media and AI tools are making it more difficult to distinguish authentic content from altered or generated material.

media:content.media:title: It’s Getting Harder To Know What’s Real
media:content.media:description: A look at how digital media and AI tools are making it more difficult to distinguish authentic content from altered or generated material.

item.title: How Sight Works
item.description: A simple explanation of how the eyes and brain work together to process light, recognize shapes, and create the images we see every day.

media:content.media:title: How Sight Works
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of how the eyes and brain work together to process light, recognize shapes, and create the images we see every day.

item.title: Let's Talk About Fish Eyes
item.description: A look at the structure of fish eyes and how they are adapted for underwater vision, helping fish see clearly in different light conditions.

media:content.media:title: Let's Talk About Fish Eyes
media:content.media:description: A look at the structure of fish eyes and how they are adapted for underwater vision, helping fish see clearly in different light conditions.

item.title: Green Technology Shaping the Future
item.description: An overview of emerging eco-friendly technologies designed to reduce environmental impact and support more sustainable energy and production systems.

media:content.media:title: Green Technology Shaping the Future
media:content.media:description: An overview of emerging eco-friendly technologies designed to reduce environmental impact and support more sustainable energy and production systems.

item.title: Is Our Universe Inside a Black Hole?
item.description: A look at a theoretical idea in cosmology that explores whether our universe could exist within a black hole, based on current scientific models.

media:content.media:title: Is Our Universe Inside a Black Hole?
media:content.media:description: A look at a theoretical idea in cosmology that explores whether our universe could exist within a black hole, based on current scientific models.

item.title: Where Would You End Up Digging Through Earth?
item.description: A look at the concept of antipodes—points on the opposite side of Earth—and where a tunnel from the U.S. would likely lead.

media:content.media:title: Where Would You End Up Digging Through Earth?
media:content.media:description: A look at the concept of antipodes—points on the opposite side of Earth—and where a tunnel from the U.S. would likely lead.
